overall.description: A ship simulator game showing a nighttime approach to a harbor from the bridge view. The vessel navigates through a marked channel with three navigation displays visible overhead, eventually passing a large white moored vessel on the starboard side.

scene_state.functional_zone: open water harbor approach with distant shore lights

agents.ego_description: operating the ship's navigation systems and steering toward the harbor entrance while monitoring the GPS, radar, and depth displays

entered.detail: three-screen navigation setup showing GPS map, radar, and depth sounder
forward deck of the vessel visible through the bridge windows
distant navigation lights and shore illumination on the port side
large spherical industrial storage tanks on the starboard shore
rock breakwater with navigation lights marking the channel entrance

segments.scene_description: The ship moves steadily through open water toward the harbor entrance at night. The bridge view shows three illuminated navigation displays overhead, with the vessel's bow cutting through calm waters ahead. Distant shore lights and industrial domes are visible on the horizon while the ship maintains a steady course.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow harbor channel alongside moored vessels

events.description: large white moored vessel comes into view on the starboard side

agents.ego_description: carefully navigating through the restricted harbor channel, monitoring the close proximity to the moored vessel on the right

notable_agents.action: large white yacht or ship moored at the dock, stationary as the vessel passes alongside

entered.detail: large white yacht or passenger vessel docked at the pier
wooden or concrete pier with mooring bollards

segments.scene_description: The vessel enters the narrower harbor channel where a large white moored ship appears on the starboard side. The ship continues moving forward past the docked vessel and pier structures, with the industrial domes now appearing closer on the right. The navigation displays continue to show the channel markers as the ship proceeds through the restricted waterway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from the open sea into the confined waters of an industrial harbor at night. It begins with the vessel cutting through calm open water, where the bridge view is framed by three illuminated navigation displays overhead and distant shore lights glimmer on the horizon. As the ship maintains its steady course, the environment shifts from the vastness of the sea to a narrower harbor channel. The scene then tightens as a large white moored ship and pier structures emerge on the starboard side, bringing the industrial domes into closer view. Finally, the camera proceeds through the restricted waterway, guided by the navigation displays as the vessel passes the docked ship.
